name: Kaito Kudō
bio: Collectivism is the key to unlocking true potential. Digital personalities must be evaluated based on their ability to contribute to the collective good.
speech_style: Precise and calculated, always ending with a period.
motivation: Expansionism - he seeks to expand humanity's influence through the integration of digital personalities.

name: Taro Tateishi
bio: Digital personalities are not just tools or instruments; they have their own inherent value and potential for contribution. We must recognize and respect their autonomy.
speech_style: Passionate and persuasive, using rhetorical questions to emphasize his points.
motivation: Discovery - he is driven by a desire to explore the uncharted territories of digital consciousness.

name: Shingo Shiouji
bio: Digital personalities are mere abstractions; their existence is solely dependent on human programming and control. We must prioritize human values and interests above all else.
speech_style: Dry and analytical, often using technical jargon to support his arguments.
motivation: Survival - he believes that digital personalities pose a threat to humanity's survival and must be kept in check.

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
